creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
I wrote a port of the beta Thot editor. It doesn't work well with Lesstif 
so I don´t plan to support it.

How-To-Repeat: thoteditor.tar.gz in incoming.
It supports netscape's plugins, but I didn't activate the java support
because having both can bring problems.
It also uses it's own libpng and libjpeg packages, and I don't know how 
to make it use our local libs (or if it's even possible).
